question: Show the name of the teacher for the math course.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.Name FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID WHERE T2.Course  =  "Math"
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T1.col_1 = T3.col_1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T3.col_2 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_2 = 'Math'
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T1.col_1 = T3.col_1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T3.col_2 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_2 = 'Math'
